title: Zaragoza, Aragon — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zaragoza, Aragon: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zaragoza is a city in Aragon with a population of 675,000. A historic city on the Ebro River with two stunning cathedrals, Roman ruins, and a lively tapas culture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
